activities_projects.title: Policy Decision Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Analyze a real policy decision taken by the government
steps: Select a recent government policy decision
Identify the institutions involved
Explain how the decision was implemented

activities_projects.title: Institutional Balance Essay
activities_projects.objective: Understand checks and balances among institutions
steps: Write an essay explaining how legislature, executive and judiciary balance each other
Include examples from Indian governance
Discuss why balance of power is important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains the concept of checks and balances

activities_projects.title: Parliamentary Case Analysis
steps: Find a news article about a parliamentary debate
Summarize the issue discussed
Explain how Parliament influenced government policy

activities_projects.title: Executive Power Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Examine the powers of the Prime Minister
steps: List the powers of the Prime Minister
Discuss situations where these powers may be limited
Write your conclusions

activities_projects.title: Judicial Independence Research
steps: Research how judges are appointed in India
Explain how the judiciary remains independent
Present your findings

activities_projects.title: Mock Supreme Court Case
steps: Create a hypothetical legal dispute
Assign students roles as judges and lawyers
Conduct a mock court hearing

activities_projects.title: Comparative Government Study
steps: Study features of both systems
Prepare a comparison chart
Explain which system you think is more effective

activities_projects.title: Public Interest Litigation Case Study
steps: Research a famous Public Interest Litigation case
Explain the issue and court decision
Describe its impact on society
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyzes the role of judiciary in protecting public interest

activities_projects.title: Institutional Accountability Discussion
steps: Discuss how each institution is accountable to the people
Provide examples
Write a conclusion

activities_projects.title: Research Project on Indian Democracy
steps: Research the interaction between legislature, executive and judiciary
Prepare a short report
Present findings to the class
